name: Cartenon Temple (Double Dungeon)
description: A seemingly low-rank E-gate containing a hidden sanctuary of god. Don't look into the eyes of the statue.

name: Glow Stone Cave
description: A dungeon containing magical feline beasts. Good for grinding basic stats.

name: Frozen Wilderness (Red Gate)
description: A dimensional anomaly gate that seals upon entry, stranding hunters in an icy snowstorm.

name: Demon Castle
description: A multi-floor dimensional tower located in Seoul, filled with high-ranking demon soldiers and hellfire.

name: High Orc Temple
description: A giant gate containing elite Orc shamans who cast powerful shield barriers and gravity magic.

name: Jeju Island Nest
description: An open island dungeon overrun by hyper-evolved mutant ants that can devour hunters and fly.
